title: Mickey Joe's Flowers!
description: Revamps the flowers to an enhanced 3D look while respecting the vanilla artstyle. Levels up the flowers of the game. By Mickey Joe
body:
The flowers of [Barely Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default/) as a seperate addon pack

PLEASE CHECK OUT THE FULL FEATURE REVIEW VIDEO :D

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WQ73j2drgjE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This pack and video contain, reworked:
Rose Bush
Allium
Peony
Dandelion
Wither Rose
(Open/Closed) Eyeblossom
Lilac
Poppy
Cornflower
Oxeye Daisy
Sunflower
Lily of the Valley
Tulip (Red, White, Orange, Pink)
Blue Orchid
Pitcher Plant sniffer flower
Chorus Flower
Lily pad
Mushroom & Fungi
Bush
